result: The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script loaded all 5 input files from data/input/, merged them using full_join by NSID, converted wave-specific missing codes to standard codes (-9, -8, -1, -3), created age-specific ethnicity variables (eth14, eth15, eth17, eth23, eth32), and created a consolidated ethnicity variable (eth) that prioritizes the earliest valid response. The cleaned data has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
